effective_profile.description: Current executable UI profile. Documents real desktop behavior first while keeping governance convergence targets visible.
known_realities: Desktop runtime currently combines ui/styles token-contract CSS with a legacy compatibility layer aggregated through apps/desktop/src/renderer/app-layout.css.
apps/desktop/src/renderer/styles/** remains a runtime dependency for pre-existing shell, literature, and paper-writing surfaces, but it is now frozen as a compatibility-only layer owned by T-022.

target_profile.feature_css_policy: Feature CSS should remain structural; visual tokens should come from ui/styles token contract.
target_profile.inline_style_policy: Prefer class/token usage; inline style should be avoided unless approved exception exists.
target_profile.hardcoded_literal_policy: Hardcoded color/shadow literals should be removed from feature CSS.
target_profile.governance_gate_expectation: spec approval aligned + code audit scopes covering desktop renderer paths.

known_deviations.title: Legacy desktop feature CSS remains a compatibility-only runtime layer
known_deviations.impact: Current desktop UI remains executable, but pre-data-ui surfaces still depend on a frozen compatibility layer that sits outside the target token/contract path.
known_deviations.follow_up_entrypoint: Continue the retirement plan in T-022 by migrating legacy interface clusters off app-layout.css and deleting their feature CSS imports.

known_deviations.title: UI governance excludes legacy desktop styles as a temporary containment measure
known_deviations.impact: The gate is green for current renderer code, but legacy CSS is still out of scan scope until retirement waves complete.
known_deviations.follow_up_entrypoint: Retain the exclusion only until T-022 migration waves remove the dependency on apps/desktop/src/renderer/styles.

notes.tailwind_boundary: Tailwind is allowed for layout only; do not use it for color/typography/radius/shadow/spacing.
notes.global_vs_feature_css: Global UI lives in ui/styles (layers reset/tokens/contract). Feature CSS must stay in @layer feature and must not define visual tokens.
notes.change_policy: Theme changes are token-only. Contract expansion requires RFC + approval.
notes.interpretation_rule: When effective_profile and target_profile diverge, current execution behavior follows effective_profile and must be explained by known_deviations.
